prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约 16829→18688→31571→30252→48861，整体呈持续后移趋势，尤其 2023 年因新增本科一批B段导致位次大幅后移至 31571，2024 年略有回升至 30252，2025 年新高考首年进一步后移至 48861，近 3 年累计后移约 3 万余名，波动幅度较大；该校在山西省理科/物理类招生计划 2021 年 2216 人、2022 年 1933 人、2023 年 3809 人、2024 年 4101 人、2025 年 4742 人，呈持续扩招态势；2026 年计划 4875 人，较 2025 年增加 133 人（+2.8%），扩招对竞争有轻微加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 太原理工大学为 211、双一流高校；软科主榜排名持续上升，2021 年第 113 名→2023 年第 107 名→2025 年第 103 名→2026 年第 97 名，首次进入全国前 100，学校综合实力与声誉稳步提升；2022 年声誉评价偏负面（郑强书记管理受学生批评），但 2026 年声誉文件中未出现该校负面信号，近期无重大舆情事件；抖音热度排名第 63、评价为"一般"，短视频平台关注度不高，未出现明显的报考热度异常信号；化学工程与技术为 A- 学科（第五轮评估），是该校唯一 A- 及以上学科；此外机械工程、材料科学与工程、电气工程等工科专业为传统优势方向，与招生专业中的化工、机械、材料、电气等方向高度对应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2024–2026 年专业热度显示，电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信、计算机类等工科专业持续高热推荐，与太原理工大学以工科为主的学科结构高度契合，相关专业报考热度较高；山西省 2026 年物理类考生 167419 人，较 2025 年 173347 人减少约 5928 人（-3.4%），竞争压力略有缓解；太原理工大学位于山西省太原市，为本省唯一 211 高校，对本省考生有天然的地域吸引力；该校在本省招生占比极高（2025 年物理类 4742 人占全国计划绝大部分），本省考生报考意愿强烈。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年新高考首年位次大幅后移的基数效应、2026 年小幅扩招（+2.8%）与物理类考生减少（-3.4%）的供需对冲、以及软科排名首次进入前 100 带来的声誉提升，预计 2026 年最低位次，预测最低位次约 49383 名，区间 48883–49883 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 48883–49883 名内，建议以二档工科专业为主力填报（自动化、机械、能源等），一档试验班专业可冲刺（电气、计算机试验班位次要求极高），三档专业（化工、材料、土木等）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限时可重点冲刺一档王牌试验班。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 16829→18688→31571→30252→48861, showing a continuous backward trend. Especially in 2023, due to the addition of a new undergraduate batch B segment, the ranking significantly dropped to 31571. In 2024, it slightly recovered to 30252. In 2025, the first year of the new college entrance examination, it further dropped to 48861. Over the past 3 years, the cumulative backward shift is about 30,000+ places, with large fluctuations. The university's enrollment plan in Shanxi for science/physics category was 2216 in 2021, 1933 in 2022, 3809 in 2023, 4101 in 2024, and 4742 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 4875, an increase of 133 (+2.8%) compared to 2025, which slightly intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Taiyuan University of Technology is a 211 and Double First-Class university. Its main ranking on Soft Science has been rising: 113th in 2021 → 107th in 2023 → 103rd in 2025 → 97th in 2026, entering the national top 100 for the first time, indicating steady improvement in comprehensive strength and reputation. In 2022, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (Secretary Zheng Qiang's management criticized by students), but in 2026, no negative signals appeared in the reputation documents, and there have been no recent major public opinion incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 63rd, with an evaluation of 'average', indicating low attention on short video platforms and no obvious abnormal application heat signals. Chemical Engineering and Technology is an A- discipline (fifth round evaluation), the only A- or above discipline at the university. Additionally, mechanical engineering, materials science and engineering, electrical engineering, and other engineering majors are traditional advantageous directions, highly corresponding to the chemical, mechanical, materials, and electrical directions in the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: From 2024 to 2026, major popularity shows that engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication, and Computer Science continue to be highly recommended, highly consistent with Taiyuan University of Technology's engineering-focused discipline structure, leading to high application heat for related majors. In 2026, there are 167,419 physics category examinees in Shanxi, a decrease of about 5,928 (-3.4%) from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure. Taiyuan University of Technology is located in Taiyuan, Shanxi, and is the only 211 university in the province, naturally attracting local examinees. The university has an extremely high proportion of enrollment in the province (in 2025, 4,742 physics category students account for the vast majority of the national plan), and local examinees have strong willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the base effect of the significant ranking drop in the first year of the new college entrance examination in 2025, the supply-demand offset of a slight enrollment expansion (+2.8%) in 2026 and a decrease in physics category examinees (-3.4%), as well as the reputation boost from Soft Science ranking entering the top 100 for the first time, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 49,383, with a range of 48,883–49,883.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation (Experimental Class)
- Computer Science and Technology (Experimental Class)
- Robotics Engineering (Experimental Class)
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated System (Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Automation
- Electronic Information Engineering
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation
- Energy and Power Engineering
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Materials Science and Engineering
- Chemical Engineering and Technology
- Civil Engineering
- Safety Engineering
- Textile Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 48,883–49,883, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 engineering majors (automation, mechanical, energy, etc.) as the main choices, Tier 1 experimental class majors (electrical, computer experimental classes have very high ranking requirements) can be used as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (chemical, materials, civil, etc.) as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range, you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship experimental classes.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名持续上升至 2026 年第 97 名，首次进入全国前 100，学校整体声誉提升；2022 年声誉评价偏负面（郑强书记管理受批评），但 2026 年无新增负面信号；抖音热度一般（排名 63），文科专业非该校优势方向，关注度有限；化学工程与技术 A- 为唯一 A- 及以上学科，属工科；文科专业（法学、会计、英语、汉语国际教育等）无 A 类学科支撑，学科实力相对一般。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学社会热度为分化观望（偏热但竞争激烈），会计/财务/审计为推荐，英语/外语为一般观望；山西省 2026 年历史类考生 63113 人，较 2025 年 84879 人大幅减少约 21766 人（-25.6%），竞争压力显著缓解；太原理工大学为本省唯一 211，对本省文科考生有较强地域吸引力；文科招生专业均为本校非优势方向，但 211 品牌效应仍具竞争力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年新高考首年位次后移的基数效应、2026 年历史类考生大幅减少（-25.6%）对竞争的显著缓解、以及扩招（+7.1%）的部分对冲，预计 2026 年最低位次，预测最低位次约 5092 名，区间 4592–5592 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 2813→3159→3989→4063→5027, showing a continuous backward trend. Over the past 5 years, the cumulative backward shift is about 2214 places, with an average annual shift of about 440 places. The largest shift occurred in 2025, the first year of the new college entrance examination (+964 places). The enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Shanxi Province was 143 in 2021, 118 in 2022, 153 in 2023, 174 in 2024, and 238 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 255, an increase of 17 (+7.1%) compared to 2025, with a relatively large expansion rate, which intensifies competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking continues to rise to 97th in 2026, entering the national top 100 for the first time, enhancing the overall reputation of the school. In 2022, the reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (criticism of Secretary Zheng Qiang's management), but no new negative signals in 2026. Douyin popularity is average (ranked 63), liberal arts majors are not the school's strength, with limited attention. Chemical Engineering and Technology A- is the only A- or above discipline, belonging to engineering. Liberal arts majors (Law, Accounting, English, Teaching Chinese to Speakers of Other Languages, etc.) have no A-class discipline support, with relatively average disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law social popularity is divided and wait-and-see (somewhat hot but competitive), Accounting/Finance/Auditing is recommended, English/Foreign Languages is generally wait-and-see. In 2026, the number of history category examinees in Shanxi Province is 63,113, a significant decrease of about 21,766 (-25.6%) compared to 84,879 in 2025, significantly easing competitive pressure. Taiyuan University of Technology is the only 211 in the province, with strong regional appeal for liberal arts examinees in Shanxi. Liberal arts majors are not the school's strength, but the 211 brand effect remains competitive.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the base effect of the ranking backward shift in the first year of the new college entrance examination in 2025, the significant reduction in history category examinees in 2026 (-25.6%) which eases competition, and the partial offset from enrollment expansion (+7.1%), the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 5092, with a range of 4592–5592.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4592–5592, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (International Economics and Trade, Teaching Chinese to Speakers of Other Languages, Administrative Management) as the main choices, Tier 1 (Law, Accounting) can be attempted as reach options, and Tier 3 language majors as safety options. Liberal arts majors are not the strength of Taiyuan University of Technology, but the 211 platform still has strong appeal for liberal arts examinees.
